nasb.text: Judah saw there a daughter of a certain Canaanite whose name was Shua; and he took her and went in to her.

esv.text: There Judah saw the daughter of a certain Canaanite whose name was Shua. He took her and went in to her,

cnv.text: 猶大在那裡看見迦南人書亞的女兒，就娶了她，與她親近。

ccb.text: 他在那里遇见了迦南人书亚的女儿，就娶她为妻，与她同房。

csbs.text: 犹大在那里看见迦南人书亚的女儿，就娶了她，与她同房。
